name: PII
description: Classification for data containing personally identifiable information subject to nDSG/GDPR

tags.name: Sensitive
tags.description: PII fields requiring crypto-shredding (ADR-009). Includes: name, firstName, socialSecurityNumber, dateOfBirth, addresses.

tags.name: PersonIdentifier
tags.description: Direct person identifiers (personId, AHV number). Key deletion in Vault renders all associated data unreadable.

tags.name: Address
tags.description: Physical address data (street, city, postalCode). Subject to right-to-erasure.

retentionPolicies.name: gdpr-7y-retention
retentionPolicies.description: 7 year retention for insurance audit compliance, then crypto-shredding via Vault key deletion
